subject: Re: warp/M in a virtual instance
body:
Hi Wim,

Do you actually run M on a virtual machine? Or do you use it just for Warp?

Best,
Alexandre
Le dimanche 11 octobre 2020 à 11:28:00 UTC+2, wim...@gmail.com a écrit :

> Hi Pranav,
>
> Here’s our setup:
>
> https://www.embl.de/services/itservices/empowering-science/3D-Cloud/
>
> One basically rents VM’s from IT, these VM’s can always be adapted 
> resource-wise (CPU’s, memory, GPU’s etc.).
>
> Best,
>
> Wim
>
> On 9. Oct 2020, at 14:50, Pranav Shah <p.sha...@gmail.com> wrote:
>
> ﻿
>
> Hi Dimitry, 
>
> We are exploring the possibility of running Warp/M in a virtual instance 
> of Windows. Do you think that it is possible?
>
> Best,
> Pranav
> --
> Pranav Shah
> Postdoctoral Research Fellow.
>
